scripts.build: javascript-obfuscator server.src.js --output server.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 0.5 --string-array true --string-array-encoding rc4 --string-array-threshold 0.75 --string-array-rotate true --string-array-shuffle true --dead-code-injection true --dead-code-injection-threshold 0.2 --self-defending true --identifier-names-generator mangled --rename-globals false --transform-object-keys true
